title: BugReopened payload
description: Emitted when a previously-resolved bug is reopened via bug_reopen. Carries a snapshot of the resolution being reversed so the ledger preserves the round-trip history without forcing a reader to walk back through events. The envelope's refs.caused_by_event_id points at the BugResolved being reversed.

previous_resolution.description: A copy of the BugResolved payload that the reopen is reversing. Same shape as BugResolved.json. Stored inline rather than referenced so the ledger reads top-to-bottom without joins.
